channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Cycling signage at start of alley way between Selkirk Gardens and Whaddon Road, Cheltenham, 30th May
item.description:
I would like to report some cycling signage that has been put up incorrectly by the alley between Selkirk Gardens and Whaddon Road. I’ve attached two photos the illustrate this. The dual signs are currently showing the opposite direction to the true one. The two signs just need to be turned 180 degrees and they’ll be fine.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7-12, Selkirk Close, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Fly tipping - old woood/garden furniture, 30th May
item.description:
Old wooden seat, various wood, & bag of rubbish left at side of road. This is a common fly tipping area, could do with monitoring on a regular basis. Seems end of the week fly tipping of rubbish/scrap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ashchurch Rural, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I am afraid that there are potholes appearing all along this road, 30th May
item.description:
Difficult to pinpoint exactly on the map there are pot holes appearing all along this road now, probably due to the volume of heavy lorries and traffic, it would be nice to fix them before they get a lot larger and cause major problems
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Runnings Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole cannot be avoided, 29th May

Pot hole near others that where fixed, it cannot be avoided
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Albany Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham

item.title: No grass cutting as been done this year., 29th May
item.description:
Lamppost 22 on the corner of Rookery Rd/Innsworth Lane opposite Technology Park the grass as not been cut this year at all. It will be that tall soon that I will not be able to get to my fence or windows etc.. Why is it not being maintained when in 20 yrs it was previously done by TBC ? Smaller areas have been done in the area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rookery Road, Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus Stop has been battered, 29th May
item.description:
Hi Matt The Cheltenham Spa Railway Station Gloucester Road stop has graffiti on 3 windows and then 1 smashed window. Clearly happened since updating the new timetable

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees desperately need pruning, emergency services unable to view CCTV of the street clearing onscuring view of CCTV in that area., 29th May
item.description:
After making a police report today I learned that the trees along the promenade are obscuring a view of their CCTV in this area because of the overgrown trees. They therefore may not spot or be able to follow perpetrators of crime on their CCTV causing a distinct safety and security inside black spot in this area. Urgent action needed to prune back the trees in both the area adjacent to the old cavendish house building outside Oliver bones and fat face and also along the promenade by the bus and taxi rank.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Promenade, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Visibility poor - dangerous on 'give way' both sides, 29th May
item.description:
This has been reported previously and highway deemed not an issue - we live just behind this and are constantly hearing vehicles sounding their horns and screeching of breaks. You cannot clearly see whether there is oncoming traffic from both sides of the highway whilst travelling due to the grass verges being so overgrown. This must be resolved asap to avoid a serious RTC.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gotherington Lane, Bishop's Cleeve, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
